stories.title: Base HTML structure with timer display
acceptance_criteria: index.html exists at the project root
Page has an h1 element with text 'Pomodoro Timer'
A div#timer element displays '25:00'
A 'Start' button and a 'Reset' button are visible
Layout is centered horizontally on the page with clean CSS
All CSS is inline in a <style> tag — no external stylesheets
All JS is inline in a <script> tag — no external scripts
Opening index.html in a browser shows no console errors

stories.title: Countdown timer logic
acceptance_criteria: Clicking Start begins a countdown from 25:00, updating the div#timer text every second
While running, the Start button label changes to 'Pause'
Clicking Pause stops the countdown and preserves the remaining time
Clicking Start again resumes from where it was paused
Clicking Reset returns the display to '25:00' and stops any running countdown
Timer stops automatically when it reaches '00:00'
Timer display always shows MM:SS format with leading zeros (e.g., '04:09')

stories.title: Session tracking and notifications
acceptance_criteria: A visible counter shows the number of completed work sessions (e.g., 'Sessions: 0')
When the timer reaches 00:00 after a work session, the session count increments by 1
When the timer reaches 00:00, the document title flashes between the original title and a notification message
After a work session completes (25 min), the timer automatically switches to break mode with 5:00 displayed
A visible label indicates whether the current timer is 'Work' or 'Break'
After a break session completes (5 min), the timer switches back to work mode with 25:00 displayed
Reset during break mode returns to work mode at 25:00

stories.title: LocalStorage persistence and settings
acceptance_criteria: Session count persists across page reloads (stored in localStorage)
An input field labeled 'Work (min)' allows setting custom work duration (default 25)
An input field labeled 'Break (min)' allows setting custom break duration (default 5)
Custom durations persist in localStorage across page reloads
Changing the work duration input updates the timer display when not running
Clicking Reset only resets the current timer — it does NOT reset saved settings or session count
Invalid input (non-numeric, zero, negative) is ignored — the previous valid value is kept
